warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x6 | Light Touch n Go
* Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E2MOM 12min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 6 @ 45%
02:00 6 @ 55%
HOLD 5 Sets
04:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 6 @ 65%
08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 Rounds for Time
15 Double Dumbbell Bench Press @22.5/15kg
50 Double Unders
12 V-ups
5 Bar Muscle Ups
Scale BMU to Banded Bar Muscle Ups
Rx+ 10 x GHD Sit ups

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Negative Pull Ups
AS SLOW AS POSSIBLE
If you can do more than 5, GO SLOWER
Scale to Jumping Pull Up, NO BANDS

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and BMUs heavily load pressing muscles; accessorize posterior chain and hamstrings for balance.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 15 Double Dumbbell Bench Press @22.5/15kg, 50 Double Unders, 12 V-ups, 5 Bar Muscle Ups, Scale BMU to Banded Bar Muscle Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back thickness, hamstrings.
